use_cases: Primary website navigation with dropdown submenus for hierarchical content organization
Application navigation bars with hover-triggered dropdown menus and keyboard accessibility
Responsive navigation systems that adapt between desktop and mobile interfaces
ai_summary: A Radix UI-based navigation menu system with dropdown viewport support, providing accessible keyboard navigation and hover-triggered submenus. Built with Tailwind CSS and class-variance-authority for consistent styling across interactive states including hover, focus, active, and open states. Includes child components for list, items, triggers, links, content, and viewport indicators.
